items.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as North American consumers tighten their budgets
items.description: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

items.title: From 'dear Donald' to 'Trump trillion': Inside NATO chief Mark Rutte's U.S. strategy
items.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte lavished praise on U.S. President Donald Trump during a fractious summit in Turkey this week.

items.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
items.description: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

items.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
items.description: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.

items.title: AstraZeneca stock dives 9% after heart drug trial misses target
items.description: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

items.title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
items.description: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.

items.title: AirPods-maker Luxshare sees shares close lower in tepid Hong Kong debut
items.description: The company, which is already listed in Shenzhen, had priced shares in the IPO at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars apiece, raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion).

items.title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
items.description: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

items.title: Crypto still 'off the table' for Singapore's Temasek, four years after FTX flop
items.description: Temasek's investment in the now-bankrupt FTX cryptocurrency exchange led to a writedown of $275 million in 2022, drawing much local criticism.

items.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
items.description: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

items.title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
items.description: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

items.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
items.description: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

items.title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.

items.title: Trump's European allies add distance on Iran following testy NATO summit
items.description: President Donald Trump spent two days in Ankara, Turkey with other NATO member leaders.

items.title: Trump announces long-shot bid to get Supreme Court to rehear birthright citizenship case
items.description: Trump already asked the Supreme Court to reconsider denying him an appeal of a verdict holding him liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.description: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

items.title: Levi Strauss beats quarterly expectations, raises guidance and dividend
items.description: Levi Strauss beat quarterly expectations on the top and bottom lines during its fiscal 2026 second quarter.

items.title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
items.description: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.

items.title: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border
items.description: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border.

items.title: Gas prices could rise as Iran conflict escalates—a 'budget reset' may help absorb the added cost, financial planners say
items.description: Renewed tensions with Iran could push gas prices higher. Here's how financial planners say to adjust your budget.
